Name: FRandomPlayerSequenceEntry
Description:
The random player node holds a list of sequences and parameter ranges which will be played continuously
   In a random order. If shuffle mode is enabled then each entry will be played once before repeating any

Variables.Name: Sequence
Variables.Description: Sequence to play when this entry is picked

Variables.Name: ChanceToPlay
Variables.Description: When not in shuffle mode, this is the chance this entry will play (normalized against all other sample chances)

Variables.Name: MinLoopCount
Variables.Description: Minimum number of times this entry will loop before ending

Variables.Name: MaxLoopCount
Variables.Description: Maximum number of times this entry will loop before ending

Variables.Name: BlendIn
Variables.Description: Blending properties used when this entry is blending in ontop of another entry
